title: Andrew Henderson (rugby league)
description: Professional rugby league coach and former Scotland international rugby league footballer
extract:
Andrew Henderson (born 17 June 1979) is a professional rugby league coach who is the Director of Rugby at Leigh Leopards in the English Super League and a former professional rugby league footballer who played for Scotland at international level.
He is the former assistant coach of the Warrington Wolves in the Super League, the former head of rugby at the Keighley Cougars and former head coach of the London Broncos. He played professionally as a hooker, representing Gateshead Thunder, Castleford Tigers, Balmain Tigers, Salford City Reds, Barrow Raiders and the Sheffield Eagles over a 14 year playing career. He was also a former Scotland international rugby league footballer.
